description_long: This object is a large, modern commercial airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a pair of long, swept-back wings mounted low on the body. The wings are equipped with underwing engine nacelles, each housing a turbofan engine, and the wingtips are slightly upturned, suggesting the presence of winglets. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The nose is rounded and tapers smoothly into the main fuselage, where a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit is visible. The landing gear is in a tricycle configuration, with two main gear units under the wings and a single nose gear beneath the cockpit.
description: A large, modern commercial airplane with swept-back low wings, underwing turbofan engines, and a conventional tail. The fuselage is streamlined with a forward, enclosed cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, swept-back wings, underwing engines, and the pointed nose with the cockpit above the nose gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, low-mounted wings, visible engine nacelle, and the conventional tail structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full wingspan, twin horizontal stabilizers, single vertical stabilizer, and the symmetry of the tail section.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the streamlined body, underwing engine, and the tricycle landing gear beneath the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with long, swept-back wings and slight upward winglets at the tips.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows
